Notes: Semi-finals NSIC Red Baron Women's Basketball Classic
Noelle Hall scored 20 points to lead Northern State (24-5). Miranda Boepple
added 14 points and 11 rebounds for the Wolves.  Ashley Smith
had 16 points for Concordia University-St. Paul (19-10).
Game.Officials: Jon Garrow,  Bob Morrison,  Randy Waagmeester
